const result = $json
const data = Array.isArray(result) ? result : Array.isArray(result.data) ? result.data : Array.isArray(result.items) ? result.items : result.data?.data ?? []
return [{ json: { reservations: Array.isArray(data) ? data : [], sources: [{ type: 'api', name: 'GET /reservations' }] } }]
